title: Advances to housing authority
doc_html:
§577.  Advances to housing authority

Any parish or municipality located in whole or in part within the area of operation of a housing authority may, from time to time, lend or donate money to the authority or agree to take such action.

Acts 1997, No. 1188, §1.
